title: EQ - Custom EQ, change the some values, Save EQ, dialog present, click OK
scenario: Custom EQ settings are not saved after clicking OK on the Save EQ confirmation dialog
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Adjust one or more frequency band sliders (e.g., increase 100Hz by +3 dB)
expected: The EQ settings are saved, the dialog is dismissed, and the Custom EQ profile reflects the adjusted values.
